title: Company Names Tribunal decision: The Book Depository International Limited
body: "Application number 5260  Applicant Amazon Technologies, Inc. objected to the name used by The Book Depository International Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 6 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of The Book Depository International Limited is changed to SC691537, Ltd. "
